name: OthmanAdi/planning-with-files
summary: File-backed planning infrastructure for Codex and other agent CLIs, combining lifecycle hooks, isolated planning sessions, plan attestation, run ledgers, and optional completion gates tied to plan state.
evidence: Ships `.codex/hooks.json` plus Codex hook adapters for SessionStart, UserPromptSubmit, PreToolUse, PermissionRequest, PostToolUse, and Stop, with tests covering the Codex hook payload behavior.

v3 gated mode combines slug-isolated `.planning/` plan directories, SHA-256 plan attestation, JSONL run ledgers, and a Stop-hook decision table that only blocks when a gated plan has an in-progress phase and ledger progress is still advancing.
